mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE poststatus = 0 OR poststatus = 1 OR poststatus = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE type = 0 AND poststatus = 3
SELECT itemname, COUNT(*) AS count FROM post WHERE type = 0 GROUP BY itemname ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT itemplace, COUNT(*) AS count FROM post WHERE type = 0 GROUP BY itemplace ORDER BY count DESC
